Video.title: Episode 5

Video.summary: A montage of winning holiday moments, showing cash prize - winners' most excited reactions.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: Animal chaos, lost dentures, a bowling blunder, hose mishap, and funny sports fails.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: A football player hits his head on a pole; a dump - truck tips over; and - boneheads fail to break a beam of wood.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: A giant lizard enters a man's tent; Dad gets dizzy - spinning his son; and a cat - steps on a cactus.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: Videos include a buffalo chasing - camerawoman; and a boy belly flopping onto the diving board.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: A boy riding his bike into a - mailbox; a camel attacking the camera; and a dog running from - a tiger.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: A dog attacks a car's windshield wipers; a baby - flushes a flashlight; and a - man falls from a tree.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos
